zh.lifeSummary: 當Gräfin Richza von Wölpe於1171年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福尼波格艾利善根額爾時，她的父親Bernhard von Wölpe II27歲，母親Sofie von Dassel31歲。她於大約1189年與Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福可萊斯 盧福可洛斯特，埋葬在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福可萊斯 霍亞比肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gräfin Richza von Wölpe于1171年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福尼波格艾利善根額爾时，她的父亲Bernhard von Wölpe II27岁，母亲Sofie von Dassel31岁。她于大约1189年与Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福可萊斯 盧福可洛斯特，埋葬在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福可萊斯 霍亞比肯。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wölpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ethiopian: from the personal name Wolde, which is interpreted as ‘my son’ in the Ge’ez or Amharic languages. It often forms part of a Christian name, such as Woldemariam , and in this case it translates as ‘son of’. — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

North German: habitational name from either of two places so named in Mecklenburg or Pomerania or from Wolda in Lower Saxony. Possibly also a topographic name from an inflected form of Middle Low German wolt, walt ‘woods’.

variants.name: Woldemariam
meanings: Ethiopian (also Wolde Mariam): from the male personal name Wolde Mariam, which has the Christian religious meaning ‘son of Mary’ (see Wolde and Mariam ). — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Woldemichael
meanings: Ethiopian (also Wolde Michael): from the personal name Wolde Michael, which has the Christian religious meaning ‘son of St. Michael’ (see Wolde and Michael ). — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

en.lifeSummary: When Gräfin Richza von Wölpe was born in 1171, in Wölpe, Erichshagen, Nienburg, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, her father, Bernhard von Wölpe II, was 27 and her mother, Sofie von Dassel, was 31. She married Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen about 1189. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in Kloster, Lüchow, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, and was buried in Bücken, Hoya, Hanover, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gräfin Richza von Wölpe est née en 1171, à Wölpe, Erichshagen, Nienburg, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Bernhard von Wölpe II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sofie von Dassel, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen environ 1189. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée à Kloster, Kreis Lüchow, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, et a été enterrée à Bücken, Kreis Hoya, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gräfin Richza von Wölpe 1171 in Wölpe, Erichshagen, Nienburg, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bernhard von Wölpe II 27 und ihre Mutter Sofie von Dassel 31. Sie hat um 1189 Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb in Kloster, Kreis Lüchow, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Bücken, Kreis Hoya, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gräfin Richza von Wölpe è nata il nel 1171 nel Wölpe, Erichshagen, Nienburg, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Bernhard von Wölpe II, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Sofie von Dassel, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen circa 1189. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel Kloster, Kreis Lüchow, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania, e fu sepolta a Bücken, Kreis Hoya, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Gräfin Richza von Wölpe(이)가 1171년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 니버그 에리크샤겐 wo프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernhard von Wölpe II(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sofie von Dassel(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1189년 Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 크레이스 u초 클로스터에서 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 크레이스 호야 브uc켄에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gräfin Richza von Wölpe nasceu em 1171, em Wölpe, Erichshagen, Nienburg, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Bernhard von Wölpe II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sofie von Dassel, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen aproximadamente 1189. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em Kloster, Kreis Lüchow, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha, e foi sepultada em Bücken, Kreis Hoya, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gräfin Richza von Wölpe родилась в 1171 г. в местности вoлп, эричшаджен, ниенбург, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Bernhard von Wölpe II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sofie von Dassel, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen около 1189 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности клостир, крис лuчоу, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия и была похоронена в местности бuккен, крис хоя, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gräfin Richza von Wölpe nació en 1171, en Wölpe, Erichshagen, Nienburg, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Bernhard von Wölpe II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sofie von Dassel, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Graf Heinrich I von Stumpenhausen aproximadamente 1189. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en Kloster, Kreis Lüchow, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania, y fue sepultada en Bücken, Kreis Hoya, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania.
